top_signals.title: After years, Takaichi achieves Imperial House Law revision by force of numbers
top_signals.summary: The common male ancestor of the former 11 imperial family branches and the current emperor goes back about 600 years.

top_signals.title: 20% of Japan’s pledged U.S. investments underway a year after tariff deal
top_signals.summary: The Japanese government has faced unrelenting criticism on the sheer size of the proposed investments and loans spent on a foreign country.
